instructions.instruction: **Create controllers** — Inherit from the previous version's controller and override only changed actions.
instructions.original_snippets: **Create controllers** — Inherit from the previous version's controller and override only changed actions.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger version-api.

instructions.instruction: **Run compatibility specs** — Execute `rspec spec/requests/api/backward_compatibility_spec.rb` to confirm no regressions.
instructions.original_snippets: **Run compatibility specs** — Execute `rspec spec/requests/api/backward_compatibility_spec.rb` to confirm no regressions.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger version-api.

instructions.instruction: All existing v1 contract tests must remain green; a new version should never silently break prior consumers.
